Description: Unique member identifier
125-element boolean array. action_mask[i] = True means action i is eligible for this patient. Index 0 (NO_ACTION) always True.
List of HEDIS measure codes with open gaps. Actions targeting closed gaps are masked out.
Source System: Gap closure engine / HEDIS supplemental data
Business Rule: Gap must be identified by HEDIS engine using CMS technical specifications. Refresh daily from claims + supplemental.

Description: List of HEDIS measure codes already closed this measurement year.
Business Rule: Complement of open_gaps among eligible measures.

Description: Per-channel boolean availability for this patient.
Patient has active SMS consent on file and valid mobile number.
Business Rule: TCPA consent required. Check: consent_status='ACTIVE' AND mobile_number IS NOT NULL AND mobile_number_valid=true.

Description: Patient has valid, non-bounced email address on file.
Business Rule: Check: email_status='VALID' AND bounce_count=0 AND email IS NOT NULL.

Description: Patient has active member portal account.
Business Rule: Check: account_status='ACTIVE' AND last_login within 180 days.

Description: Patient has mobile app installed with push notifications enabled.
Business Rule: Check: app_installed=true AND push_enabled=true AND app_version >= min_supported_version.

Description: IVR channel is always available (phone is universal).
Business Rule: Always true. IVR uses the primary phone number on file.

Description: Number of outreach messages sent to this patient in the rolling 7-day window.
Business Rule: Count messages with send_date >= today - 7 days. Business rule: MAX_CONTACTS_PER_WEEK = 3.

Description: Map of measure_code -> days since last contact for that measure. Used for cooldown.
Business Rule: For each measure contacted in last 30 days: measure -> DATEDIFF(today, last_send_date). Business rule: MIN_DAYS_BETWEEN_SAME_MEASURE = 7.

Description: Patient under general communication suppression.
Business Rule: True if patient is in a suppression period (e.g., post-grievance cooling, active care transition, provider request). Default: false.

Description: Patient has opted out of all outreach communications.
Business Rule: True if patient selected "Do Not Contact" preference. Blocks ALL actions except NO_ACTION. Default: false.

Description: Patient has an active grievance or complaint hold.
Business Rule: True if open grievance filed within 30 days. Blocks all outreach until resolved. Default: false.

Description: Global message budget remaining for the cohort.
Business Rule: Total allocated budget minus total messages sent. When 0, only NO_ACTION is valid. Passed at batch level.

Description: Days since last email was sent to this patient.
Business Rule: DATEDIFF(today, MAX(send_date WHERE channel='email')). Business rule: MIN_DAYS_BETWEEN_EMAIL = 30. Default: 999 (never emailed).

Required: Actions on that channel are masked
Description: Medium

Required: Email actions masked for this patient
Description: Medium
Medium

Type: All active MA members in the cohort.
Required: SELECT patient_id FROM enrollment WHERE plan_active = true AND lob = 'MA'

Type: Identify open/closed gaps per member using CMS technical specifications + supplemental data.
Required: HEDIS engine output: patient_id, measure, gap_status (OPEN/CLOSED)

Type: Query CRM for consent status, email validity, portal registration, app install status.
Required: SELECT patient_id, sms_consent, email_valid, portal_active, app_push_enabled FROM crm_contacts

Type: Count contacts in rolling windows and last contact date per measure.
Required: SELECT patient_id, COUNT(*) as contacts_7d FROM outreach_log WHERE send_date >= DATEADD(day, -7, GETDATE()) GROUP BY patient_id

Type: Query grievance system, care management, and preference center.
Required: SELECT patient_id, opt_out, grievance_hold, suppressed FROM member_preferences

Type: For each patient, iterate through 125 actions and apply rules 1-7 above to produce the boolean mask.
Output one record per patient with all fields.
Rebuild daily before the inference batch run. Gap data from overnight claims refresh. Contact data from real-time outreach log.
Required: Schedule: 4:00 AM ET daily, before 6:00 AM inference batch.
